vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi mang tính bước ngoặt/căn bản về
vocab.example: There has been a paradigm shift in how news sites present information, moving from static text to highly interactive data visualizations.

vocab.meaning: chuyển đổi mượt mà giữa các nền tảng/chế độ
vocab.example: I've noticed that most websites now allow users to seamlessly transition between light and dark modes based on their system settings.

vocab.meaning: mã hóa đầu cuối (bảo mật toàn diện)
vocab.example: Many communication-based websites have implemented end-to-end encryption to bolster user privacy against potential data breaches.

vocab.meaning: các trình điều khiển cảm ứng trực quan
vocab.example: A major change is the introduction of intuitive touch-friendly controls, making desktop sites much easier to navigate on tablets.

vocab.meaning: đồng bộ hóa dựa trên nền tảng đám mây
vocab.example: The most significant update is the cloud-based synchronization, which ensures my preferences are saved regardless of which device I use.

vocab.meaning: được tùy chỉnh theo hành vi cá nhân
vocab.example: Websites are becoming increasingly tailored to individual behavior, showing me content that aligns perfectly with my previous searches.

vocab.meaning: loại bỏ các lỗi kỹ thuật
vocab.example: Recent updates have managed to eliminate technical glitches that used to cause the site to crash during peak hours.

vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự tinh chỉnh về mặt hình ảnh
vocab.example: The platform didn't change its core features, but it did undergo a visual refinement to appear more modern and professional.

vocab.meaning: tuân thủ các luật quyền riêng tư nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: Websites have had to change their cookie policies to adhere to stringent privacy laws like the GDPR.

vocab.meaning: giàu các yếu tố tương tác
vocab.example: The latest version of the site is much more rich in interactive elements, such as live polls and dynamic infographics.
